notes: 3S 850mAh; the size step up from lipo-3s-450 for builds with a weapon motor's much higher stall draw
description: A higher-capacity three-cell pack for builds that need real headroom under a weapon motor's stall current, not just a drive motor's — more mass than lipo-3s-450, in exchange for a rail that doesn't trip E30 the moment a weapon is added.
